top.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
top.summary: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.

top.title: Katya Adler: Europe's Nato allies push back at reported US threat to Spain
top.summary: On Friday morning, souring relations between Europe and the United States  reared its Medusa-like head again, writes the BBC's Europe editor.

top.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
top.summary: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.

top.title: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
top.summary: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.

top.title: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
top.summary: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.

top.title: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
top.summary: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.
